runtime_expectations: Hermes-compatible skills directory layout with SKILL.md files
dream.py expects HERMES_HOME and reads ~/.hermes/sessions/session_*.json relative to that home
dream/config.json may also carry heuristic tuning under heuristics for label inference in different environments
External memory promotion in real mode assumes fact_store/fact_feedback are available when Holographic is enabled
Promotion execution is runtime-specific and should follow dream-promoter-instructions for the selected adapter
install_notes: Run ./install.sh --hermes-home <target_hermes_home> --mode safe|real to install the pack into a Hermes runtime
Use --force if reinstalling over an existing dream-skill-pack deployment
Copy the three skill folders into the target agent's skills tree, or expose them via skills.external_dirs on Hermes.
Copy scripts/dream.py into the target agent's scripts directory and schedule cron with script=dream.py while loading memory-capture-layering + dream-promoter-instructions.
Initialize ~/.hermes/dream/config.json and ~/.hermes/dream/state.json from the provided templates
Adjust dream/config.json -> heuristics if the target environment needs extra generic path suppression or project-context markers
If using another framework, treat the SKILL.md files as prompts/playbooks and adapt dream.py to that framework's storage + scheduler model
